name: html-basic
description: A basic HTML page, as plain and simple as it gets while keeping the correct semantic structure. This template is a solid starting point for any HTML document.

vars.title: Your Page Title
vars.author: netnet
vars.p: Welcome to my page! Take a look at my recent projects and interests below.

head-ele.title: The <head> element
head-ele.code: <!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->

title-ele.title: The <title> element
title-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		{{code}}
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

temp-title'.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{code}}</title>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

your-title.template:

		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->

meta-ele.title: <meta> elements
meta-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		{{code}}
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

author.title: <meta> author
author.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta {{code}}>
		<meta>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

temp-author.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" {{code}}>
		<meta>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

your-author.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" {{code}}>
		<meta>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

description.title: <meta> description
description.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta {{code}}>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

temp-description.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta name="description"  {{code}}>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

your-description.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta name="description"  {{code}}>
	</head>
	<body></body>

viewport.title: <meta> viewport
viewport.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta name="description" content="{{description}}">
		{{code}}

	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

body-ele.title: The <body> element
body-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta name="description" content="{{description}}">
		<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

	</head>
	<body>
		{{code}}
	</body>
</html>
body-ele.code: <!-- you page's content goes here in the body -->

h1-ele.title: header <h1> element
h1-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta name="description" content="{{description}}">
		<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

	</head>
	<body>
		<!-- you page's content goes here in the body -->
		{{code}}
	</body>
</html>

p-ele.title: paragraph <p> element
p-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		<meta name="author" content="{{author}}">
		<meta name="description" content="{{description}}">
		<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

	</head>
	<body>
		<!-- you page's content goes here in the body -->
		{{code}}
	</body>
</html>
